title: Cobblemon-Red,Blue,Yellow and Green (Redone)
description: A Cobblemon experience with mods for both Visual and adding Kanto Based Pokémon into the game all 151 (Note this is a Redoing of the Original)
body:
# This adds all 151 Kanto Regionals through the Help of Mods and Datapacks

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This may run ito problems and cause lag with low end PCS it is recommended you test if your PC can run Fabric before trying to play the Modpack

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This will be updated when I can (Redones will be done if needed and issues will be adressed however Lag related Issues will be ignored)


</details>

(Download Goal is 50 for Next Generation) (Once we Reached the Final Generation there will be a Binder will also will include non Generationals of the Cobblemon Modpack of the Final Version, Non Generationals will be updated on there respected month,Season and Download total requirements after all Generations are made they will be updated on the Season) If you want Progress on any of these Join the Discord Server for Cobblemon and go to the Modpacks and you should find this one with this you can request anything that fits into the modpack and doesn't alter it too much but you also get Progess about the Download goals as well as Progess of these modpacks (Some will be in Screenshots be aware that this might be uncommon or rare but still check as people also make great screenshots) (75 For this or 50 total Downloads and 25 Downloads for the Next generation for Magikarp Jump)
